changes.rationale: Guard clause ensuring ACK/NACK is only processed for the connection that delivered the Setting

changes.description: Refactored END frame building to use build_end_time_frame() helper

Disconnect cleanup for pending state as specified in plan

changes.description: Enhanced note_box_disconnect() with timeout task cancellation
changes.rationale: Cancels ack_task and applied_task to prevent stale callbacks

changes.description: Added clear_pending_on_disconnect() call in disconnect handler
changes.rationale: Disconnect wiring for cleanup as specified in plan

changes.description: Added delivered_conn_id stamping when cloud delivers Setting
changes.rationale: Sets ownership when cloud forwarder delivers Setting

out_of_scope_changes.justification: Pure observability enhancement (fire_event calls). Does not alter hybrid mode state machine logic or timing. Does not affect fix scope.

G1_no_weather_changes.description: No changes to unrelated flows (IsNewWeather, IsNewFW, general cloud path behavior)
evidence: grep for IsNewWeather/IsNewFW in diff returned only context lines (no + or - changes)
Weather and FW poll handling logic unchanged

G2_no_timing_tweaks.description: No ad-hoc timing constant changes as a substitute for state correctness
evidence: Only reference to timeout_s in diff is telemetry detail recording (not value change)
Fix uses state ownership (conn_id) instead of timing workarounds

G3_no_speculative_fixes.description: No speculative fixes without evidence links
evidence: All changes traceable to plan tasks 7, 8, 9, 10, 11
Fix addresses cross-session timeout root cause from evidence
delivered_conn_id ownership model matches plan specification
All changes are to source code and tests only
No database migrations or schema changes
No configuration file modifications outside code

weather_handling.method: grep for IsNewWeather in diff +/- lines

firmware_handling.method: grep for IsNewFW in diff +/- lines

general_cloud_path.method: Diff review - only telemetry/error context added, no flow changes

timing_constants.method: grep for TIMEOUT_S/timeout_s assignments in diff

marginal_items.justification: Pure telemetry (fire_event). No state machine or behavioral changes.
Additive observability only. No behavior changes. Counter fields with clear/reset pattern.
Additive telemetry for error context. No error handling flow changes.

fidelity_score.explanation: Score of 0.97 reflects excellent scope fidelity. All core changes are strictly within scope. Small deduction (0.03) for marginal telemetry additions in hybrid_mode.py and extra telemetry fields in telemetry_collector.py - these are pure observability enhancements with zero behavioral impact.

recommendations.description: Consider moving extra telemetry fields to separate task
recommendations.reason: telemetry_collector.py has additional fields (nack_reasons, cloud_gap_durations, etc.) beyond the specified conn_mismatch_drops. These are benign but could be tracked separately.
